nodes.label: TechStore SPA Frontend
nodes.rationale: Implements the core frontend single page application for browsing products, managing a cart, and checking out.

nodes.label: User Authentication Module
nodes.rationale: Handles login/registration modal interactions and manages user credentials locally.

nodes.label: Agent Workflow Rules
nodes.rationale: Prescribes non-interactive terminal flags, beads integration rules, and handoff protocols.

nodes.label: AI Agent Project Instructions
nodes.rationale: Documents build/test commands, architecture details, and developer conventions.

nodes.label: Beads Issue Tracker Guide
nodes.rationale: Provides quick start commands for bd issue tracking.

nodes.label: Beads Configuration Settings
nodes.rationale: Sets repository issue prefixes, backup behaviors, and remote syncing.

nodes.label: Beads Skill Instruction Guide
nodes.rationale: Contains instructions for Claude Code and Codex to use beads CLI.

nodes.label: Graphify Skill Instruction Guide
nodes.rationale: Contains pipeline rules, command triggers, and visualization instructions for mapping directories to graphs.
